Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Wait, why am I telling you this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Well, whatever. You have to admit, he is a hottie.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fawning student continues to sigh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He's different than I imagined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}From what I can tell, he has no personality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Eww! Did you see that!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}That guy over there just picked his nose and then... flung it everywhere![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}That guy there... Isn't he acting funny?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Yeah... I thought he seemed weird...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Really? Well, if you ask me, he seems weird...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Uh-oh... That guy's staring at me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}I hope he's not going to ask me out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}You really have to be careful who you date nowadays.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}They say love is blind, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}There's no way I could ever date a guy like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The first thing I do when I get to school is look for him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Just seeing him makes me smile.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}*sigh* What should I do...? How should I express my feelings for him...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}I know I can't go on without talking to him, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Maybe I would be satisfied just staring at him from afar.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}*sigh* What should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Oh my god! Did you see that!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He just threw a rock at a bird resting on that branch![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did you see that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He just threw a rock at a bird resting on that branch![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}If he keeps that up, he might get possessed by evil spirits...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}But that's just a rumor, so probably not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Did you just see that!? Look at that guy over there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He just spit his gum into the fountain![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}So disgusting... What is he thinking!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}That guy who's been following me... Is he blushing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Is this what they call "disillusionment"? I didn't realize he was that kind of guy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}I'm gonna stop following him. This is so disappointing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}The last thing I need is another guy like him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Is that guy who keeps following me around gonna talk to me or what?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}No normal guy would wait this long to talk to a girl, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}See that guy over there? I think he's been following me around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}What should I do in a situation like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Hmm... It feels like someone's watching me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}God! This guy following me around just won't quit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He must be one stubborn guy to follow anyone around this much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}He'll probably be a detective or something when he grows up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Huh... I still get the sense that someone's following me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}Hey, there's someone over there. Hm, that guy looks familiar...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}You see that guy over there, right? You know, the one who's been following me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}I don't know how to get rid of him... So I guess I'll just let him do whatever it is he's doing.[n]{f 1 1}
